gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/165)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/165)
text: رَجُلٍ مَاتَ وَ تَرَكَ امْرَأَتَهُ وَ أُخْتَهُ وَ جَدَّهُ قَالَ هَذَا مِنْ أَرْبَعَةِ أَسْهُمٍ لِلْمَرْأَةِ الرُّبُعُ وَ لِلْأُخْتِ سَهْمٌ وَ لِلْجَدِّ سَهْمَانِ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Abu Ubeyda,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who died and left his wife, and his sister, and his grandfather. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is from four shares – for the wife is the quarter, and for the sister is one share, and for the grandfather are two shares’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ibn Mahbub has narrated from ibn Ri’ab from abu ‘Ubaydah who has narrated the following: “About the case of a man who dies and leaves behind his wife, sister and his grandfather, abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is distributed from four parts. The woman receives one-fourth, the sister receives one share and the grandfather receives two shares.’”
